Detailed Description

Parent class => FeedbackSystem 

* Device Functionality - Hall Feedback for Lyra
* System ID: 0x2C
*
* The hall readout system provides information about the actual position of actuator.
* It also includes the parameter registers for setup of the hall sensor.
* Caution - sensor readout has to be disabled while accessing registers!
*
* ### Register Map:
*
*  | Address | Name        | Default Value | Description                                    |  Type  | Access     |
*  |---------|-------------|---------------|------------------------------------------------|--------|------------|
*  | 0x2C00  | RunReadout  | false (or 0)  | Enable/Disable sensors readout callbacks       | boolean| read write |
*  | 0x2C01  | NormVal_X   | N/A           | Magnetic field normalised value channel A      | float  | read only  |
*  | 0x2C02  | NormVal_Y   | N/A           | Magnetic field normalised value channel B      | float  | read only  |
*  | 0x2C03  | NormVal_Z   | N/A           | Magnetic field normalised value channel C      | float  | read only  |
*  | 0x2C04  | Temperature | N/A           | Temperature value channel A [deg.C]            | float  | read only  |
*  | 0x2C05  | EnableTComp | true (or 1)   | Enable internal HW temperature compensation    | boolean| read write |
*  | 0x2C06  | Resolution  | 1             | Bit resolution (0=16b, 1=17b, 2=18b, 3=19b)    | uint8  | read write |
*  | 0x2C07  | Gain        | 8             | Gain selection (0.1 to 1.0 in 16 steps)        | uint8  | read write |
*  |         |             |               | [0.2, 0.25, 0.3333, 0.4, 0.5, 0.6, 0.75, 1,    |        |            |
*  |         |             |               | 0.1, 0.125, 0.1667, 0.2, 0.25, 0.3, 0.375, 0.5]|        |            |
*  | 0x2C08  | Oversampling| 0             | Oversampling count=2^value [0-3 => 1-8 samples]| uint8  | read write |
*  | 0x2C09  | Averaging   | 0             | Averaging count=2^value [0-7 => 1-128 samples] | uint8  | read write |
*  | 0x2C0A  | MeasDelay   | 0             | Measurement delay [0-1260ms in 20ms steps]     | uint16 | read write |
*  | 0x2C0B  | ID1          | N/A           | Melexis unique ID word value 1                 | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x2C0C  | ID2          | N/A           | Melexis unique ID word value 2                 | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x2C0D  | ID3          | N/A           | Melexis unique ID word value 3                 | uint16 | read only  |
*  | 0x2C0E  | RunInit     | N/A           | R or W operation executes init of hall sensor  | uint32 | read write |
*  | 0x2C0F  | InitDone    | N/A           | Hall sensor initialisation status (0=NG, 1=OK) | uint32 | read only  |
*  |---------|-------------|---------------|------------------------------------------------|--------|------------|
*/
